task: Translate one novel English sentence into a procedurally constructed mini-language, using only the parallel corpus provided with each item.

item_fields.corpus: list of {conlang, english} parallel sentence pairs
item_fields.query_english: the English sentence to translate into the conlang

prediction_format.answer: the conlang translation: lowercase words separated by single spaces, no punctuation, no hyphens

scoring: deterministic exact match per item after normalization (lowercase, strip punctuation/hyphens, collapse whitespace); 1 point per item, 30 items
